workspace_mapping.format: Directories are named using a slugified version of the workspace absolute path (e.g., c--Users-Prakrititz-Borah-Downloads-OrbitOS).
workspace_mapping.session_link: Inside each project folder, JSONL files correspond to individual conversations/threads.

plans: ~/.claude/plans/*.md (Markdown files containing goal tracking and generated plans)
memory: Primarily relies on parsing the transcript and local context. No explicit global knowledge base found outside of plans.
tool_calls: Tool calls are logged within the transcript JSONL files.
~/.claude/shell-snapshots/*.sh (Snapshots of shell environment to maintain context across bash tool executions)
code_changes: ~/.claude/file-history/[project_id]/ (Backups and versions of files modified by Claude Code)
git_state: Relies on standard system Git. No internal Git tracking detected.
checkpoints: ~/.claude/file-history/[project_id]/ (Acts as an internal rollback mechanism for edited files)
sessions: ~/.claude/ide/*.lock (Tracks active VS Code / IDE extension connections)
recommended_extractors: Parse ~/.claude/projects/ using the slugified workspace path to retrieve the chat history.
Monitor ~/.claude/plans/ for markdown files that represent the agent's current high-level objectives.
Use ~/.claude/file-history/ to extract pre-generation snapshots of files if a rollback is needed.
